_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Store, retrieve, and manipulate data for analysis of system capabilities and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.554), AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.552).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.477). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, capabilities, manipulate, requirements, retrieve, store] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, develop, documentation, escalation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.896, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:76.5%, C:23.5%). No dominant classification for "Store, retrieve, and manipulate data for analysis of system capabilities and req" vs "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.568 > STS 0.477 (gap +0.091). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [analysis, capabilities, manipulate, requirements, retrieve, store]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, develop, documentation, escalation, knowledge].
